title: Shapiro steps in strongly-interacting Fermi gases
author: Del Pace, Giulia
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This dataset contains the experimental data, the code for the RCSJ calculation and the code for the numerical simulation shown in the paper "Shapiro steps in strongly-interacting Fermi gases". 
 Data tables and scripts for the RCSJ caluclation are grouped in folders corresponding to the Figures in the paper. The code for numerical simulations appear as a separate item.
steps_raw:
This dataset contains the experimental data, the code for the RCSJ calculation and the code for the numerical simulation shown in the paper "Shapiro steps in strongly-interacting Fermi gases". 
 Data tables and scripts for the RCSJ caluclation are grouped in folders corresponding to the Figures in the paper. The code for numerical simulations appear as a separate item.
